name: Kumulus Vape S.A.
summary: Kumulus Vape S.A., an e-retailer, sells electronic cigarettes and related products in France. The company offers materials for beginners; equipment, including kits, boxes, and batteries, as well as clearomizers and rebuildables; flavored e-liquids; accessories, such as detached pieces, batteries, chargers, and storage products; and DIY novelties and accessories under approximately 250 brands. Kumulus Vape S.A. was founded in 2012 and is headquartered in Lyon, France.
